title: [Apache Flink 0.8.0 available](</2015/01/21/apache-flink-0.8.0-available/>)
summary:
#  Apache Flink 0.8.0 available
January 21, 2015 -
We are pleased to announce the availability of Flink 0.8.0. This release includes new user-facing features as well as performance and bug fixes, extends the support for filesystems and intr…
